form.formComment: Most recently tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 7 at Dongara Rtg 62+ on April 4 over 1100m, 3.5 len behind Prince Ragnar with 59.5kg at $7. The race before that raced behind the speed prior to fading second last of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on March 13 over 1100m, 5 len behind Luckee Floran carrying 58.5kg at $14. Looks outclassed.

form.formComment: Last start 9th of 12 at Dongara Dongara Cup 62+ on April 4 over 1850m, 3 len behind Argyle Star carrying 57kg at $9. The start before that came from midfield and won by 2.5 len at this track Cl2 March 13 over 1600m defeating Needs Time with 58kg at $5. Is better than he showed last time out and can bounce back to his best.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 32-day let-up. Most recently led to the turn then faded second last of 11 at Albany Rtg 58+ C&G on March 8 over 1600m, on a slow track; 8 len behind Makin Prophets with 59kg at $8.50. Before that 8th of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside 0Mwly on February 22 over 1600m, 4 len behind Rudhyar with 55.5kg at $7. Can improve on what he's produced recently.

form.formComment: At the latest run made some head-way from midfield; 3rd of 12 at Pinjarra Scarpside Cl1 on March 12 over 1500m, 1.5 len behind Jazalot carrying 56kg at $31. The start before that 5th of 10 at this track Rtg 58+ on February 19 over 1200m, 2.5 len behind Bonny Rock with 53kg at $51. Better run last time and this shapes as a winnable race on the back of that performance.
